title: Tunisian Stuffed Chwinamul
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish originating from Tunisia, featuring chwinamul stuffed with a mixture of tunisian spices and xtra cheese.

ingredients.name: tunisian spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most middle eastern markets

instructions: Wash and dry the chwinamul. Cut a horizontal slit in each to create a pocket.
In a bowl, mix together the tunisian spice blend and xtra cheese.
Stuff each chwinamul with the spice and cheese mixture.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat. Add the crisp garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes.
Add the stuffed chwinamul to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the chwinamul is tender.
